subcodes.first_line: O thou whom I remember and shall never forget! Thy honorable brother hath arrived at this luminous Shrine as thy representative, and now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اذکره و لاانساه ابدا جناب اخوی بالنیابه از شما وارد بقعه نوراء گشت و الان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat]
